nodes.label: AI transcription accuracy for technical terms
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes work pays for a specialist service (such as trint or rev) sometimes it doesn't or I need something really quickly

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I have a creative block so I will ask for multiple lines and then it gives me something to build from

nodes.label: AI voice recognition accuracy with accented speech
nodes.grounding_span: I think there is a big problem with AI understanding different UK regional accents

nodes.label: AI ability to capture story essence
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to capture human nuance (silence, looks)
nodes.grounding_span: how is it going to know just because there is silence that there isn't a look or something that would be useful to the story

nodes.label: AI for mechanical task automation (LaTeX conversion)
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to core creative role
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps best for tasks like transcribing or brainstorming to save me time

nodes.label: Creative expression and quality
nodes.grounding_span: human touch is still needed to craft the story

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in transcription
nodes.grounding_span: if it isn't transcribed properly it ends up not saving any time

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: it gives me something to build from

nodes.label: Frustration with AI transcription errors
nodes.grounding_span: It makes me feel frustrated often when I'm reading through a transcript and it has got it really wrong

nodes.label: Confidence in human necessity for storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: I think with human stories it will always need a human eye

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's ability to handle nuanced visual cues
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know how soon this would happen

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I refine, like sorry that fun fact is not fun enough

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — separates creative from non-creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps best for tasks like transcribing or brainstorming to save me time
